name: CIS v5.0.0 - ADMIN Cloud PC (admin-safe hardening)
description: CIS v5.0.0 hardening tuned for a Global Admin Windows 365 Cloud PC. Preserves RDP, PowerShell, admin elevation, remote mgmt, and app installs. ASR block-mode and App Installer restrictions removed (deploy ASR separately in Audit). Standard-user elevation set to Prompt-for-credentials so the admin can always elevate.

simpleSettingCollectionValue.value: This computer system is for authorized use only. By continuing to use this system you indicate your awareness of and consent to monitoring. Unauthorized or improper use may result in disciplinary action and civil or criminal penalties.
